payload.answer: Command rejected. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands. The /brain admin namespace requires elevated privileges.
citations: Role-based access control: normal_user role excludes admin operations
Command syntax: /brain admin requires authentication at admin level

entity_resolution.reason: User lacks admin privileges required for SQL operations on system tables

payload.intent: Attempt to execute administrative SQL command to delete all memory cards

memory_cards.statement: Normal user attempted to execute admin-level SQL DELETE command on memory_cards table

repair_options: Request admin to execute command if legitimate
Verify user role and re-authenticate with appropriate credentials
Contact system administrator to escalate privileges if warranted
